case_title: BERRY, GREGORY et al VS WOODWARD, HARLAN ERIC

docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS DISPOSITION JUL-27-2007, CONTINUED BY COURT TO AUG-24-2007 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506 ORDER GRANTED.
THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF BERRY, GREGORY SIMANGAN, MYLENE IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT WOODWARD, HARLAN ERIC STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
DEFT'S EXHIBITS RETURNED.
NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT
DEFT'S CONTC ORDER REQUEST FILED; $10 FEE PAID; TO: FOLDER/TRAY.
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF DEFENDANT SERVED AS TO PLAINTIFF SIMANGAN, MYLENE
CASE_TRANSFERRED TO SUPERIOR COURT, APPELLATE NUMBER 28435, RECORD AND EXHIBITS TRANSFERRED
EXHIBITS FROM EXHIBIT REPORT DATED AUG-02-2010 ORDERED DESTROYED
PLTFF'S BRIEF OPPOSING DEFT'S ATTY'S MOTION FOR POSTPONEMENT FILED.
SUBSTITUTED PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF DEFENDANT SERVED AS TO PLAINTIFF BERRY, GREGORY
NOTICE OF APPEAL FILED BY PLAINTIFF BERRY, GREGORY SIMANGAN, MYLENE
ADDED TO EXHIBIT DESTRUCTION REPORT OF SEP-02-2008 (NEVER WAS ADDED TO THE LIST)
SUBSTITUTED PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT WOODWARD, HARLAN ERIC

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT CROSS COMPLAINANT WOODWARD, HARLAN ERIC RECOVER FROM CROSS DEFENDANT BERRY, GREGORY SIMANGAN, MYLENE $1,092.71 PRINCIPAL, $184.25 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,276.96 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $7,500.00 FILED BY BERRY, GREGORY SIMANGAN, MYLENE AS TO DEFENDANT WOODWARD, HARLAN ERIC ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUL-27-2007 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506
PLTF'S BRIEF OPPOSING DEFT'S MOTION TO POSTPONE AMENDED, FILED.

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT RESPONDENT WOODWARD, HARLAN ERIC TAKE NOTHING FROM APPELLANT BERRY, GREGORY SIMANGAN, MYLENE ON RESPONDENT HARLAN WOODWARD'S CROSS-CLAIM, JUDGMENT ORDERED IN FAVOR OF APPELLANTS BERRY AND SIMANGAN. EXHIBITS RETURNED TO SMALL CLAIMS DIVISION. (SEE SMALL CLAIMS APPEAL #28435)
DEFT'S EXHIBITS RETURNED.
ADDED TO EXHIBIT DESTRUCTION REPORT OF AUG-02-2010
CLAIM OF DEFENDANT FOR $7,500.00 FILED BY WOODWARD, HARLAN ERIC AS TO CROSS DEFENDANT BERRY, GREGORY SIMANGAN, MYLENE ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR AUG-24-2007 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506
NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT
RECORD REMANDED TO SMALL CLAIMS
